git_head: e72059d6 (branch basalt/phase1-format-core, parent of the Phase 1 commit)
note: Phase 1 format-core evidence: full cargo test log (fmt + clippy + complete suite green) and the pre-sanitization sha256 receipt for the five golden NVFP4 fixtures now checked in at tests/fixtures/dequant/nvfp4_*.json. Fixture provenance: generated by scripts/basalt-nvfp4-golden/nvfp4_fixture_gen.c calling quantize_row_nvfp4_ref/dequantize_row_nvfp4 in the pin-built ggml-base.dll (llama.cpp acd79d603, route linked-libs; ggml_ue4m3_to_fp32/ggml_fp32_to_ue4m3 compiled verbatim from the pin ggml-impl.h), MSVC cl 19.44.35228 x64, PRNG pcg32(initstate=20260716, initseq=1); real blocks sliced from the Phase 0 qwen3-0.6b NVFP4 refusal GGUF and dequantized through the same DLL. fixtures_sha256_pregen.txt hashes are the generator-output files BEFORE the <llama.cpp>/<camelid> path-placeholder sanitization pass (hence they differ from hashes of the committed fixtures); the committed fixtures match scripts/basalt-nvfp4-golden/fixtures_sha256.txt. Host paths sanitized to placeholders: <cam-basalt>=this worktree, <camelid>=the Camelid checkout, <llama.cpp>=pinned llama.cpp source/build (acd79d603), <scratchpad>=session temp dir, <home>=user home.
